Name: From. Man
Text: Help! I think something is wrong with my body!

Name: From. Man
Text: No matter how much chocolate I eat, I’m not losing any weight!!

Name: From. Man
Text: I’m drinking soda regularly like ‘Eve’ said, but why am I not losing weight?!
Toast1: “Diabetes: A type of metabolic disorder in which insulin production is insufficient or doesn’t function properly, leading to hyperglycemia, characterized by high blood glucose levels.”
Toast2: What on earth…? Eating chocolate and drinking soda to lose weight?
